query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_notifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info' COMMENT 'info/success/warning/error',
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT,
  sourceUploadId INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '관련 텔레그램 업로드 ID',
  isRead BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_notifications (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info' COMMENT 'info/success/warning/error',
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT,
  sourceUploadId INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '관련 텔레그램 업로드 ID',
  isRead BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
